mapper.select: SELECT review_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, review_mode, reviewed_amount, report_attachment_id, reviewed_by_user_id, reviewed_at FROM t_repair_project_cost_review WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_contract ( work_order_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, repair_scope_hash, fund_source, signing_method, contract_file_hash, contract_attachment_id, status, created_by_user_id, effective_at ) VALUES ( NULL, #{projectId}, #{planId}, #{tenantId}, #{supplierDeptId}, #{supplierName}, #{contractAmount}, #{repairScopeHash}, #{fundSource}, #{signingMethod}, #{contractFileHash}, #{contractAttachmentId}, 'EFFECTIVE', #{createdByUserId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT contract_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, repair_scope_hash, fund_source, signing_method, contract_attachment_id, contract_file_hash, status, created_by_user_id, effective_at, create_time FROM t_repair_contract WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status <> 'VOIDED' ORDER BY contract_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT contract_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, repair_scope_hash, fund_source, signing_method, contract_attachment_id, contract_file_hash, status, created_by_user_id, effective_at, create_time FROM t_repair_contract WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND status = 'EFFECTIVE' ORDER BY contract_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT contract_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, repair_scope_hash, fund_source, signing_method, contract_attachment_id, contract_file_hash, status, created_by_user_id, effective_at, create_time FROM t_repair_contract WHERE supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND status = 'EFFECTIVE' ORDER BY effective_at DESC, contract_id DESC

SELECT signature_id, contract_id, party_type, signer_name, signer_user_id, signature_method, signature_attachment_id, signature_file_hash, signed_at FROM t_repair_contract_signature WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY signature_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_execution_attachment(record_id, attachment_id, tenant_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{attachmentId}, #{tenantId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_execution_record SET verification_status = #{status}, verified_by_user_id = #{verifiedByUserId}, verification_opinion = #{opinion}, verified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND verification_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.sql: record_id, project_id, plan_id, work_point_id, tenant_id, stage, description, occurred_at, submitted_by_user_id, verification_status, verified_by_user_id, verification_opinion, verified_at, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_execution_record WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY record_id
SELECT attachment_id FROM t_repair_execution_attachment WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_material_photo(inspection_id, attachment_id, tenant_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{inspectionId}, #{attachmentId}, #{tenantId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_material_inspection SET status = #{status}, verified_by_user_id = #{verifiedByUserId}, verification_opinion = #{opinion}, verified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.sql: inspection_id, project_id, plan_id, work_point_id, tenant_id, material_name, brand, model, specification, quantity, unit, manufacturer, qualification_attachment_id, submitted_by_user_id, status, verified_by_user_id, verification_opinion, verified_at, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_material_inspection WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY inspection_id
SELECT attachment_id FROM t_repair_material_photo WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT settlement_id, project_id, plan_id, contract_id, tenant_id, version_no, status, subtotal_amount, tax_rate, tax_amount, total_amount, settlement_attachment_id, submitted_by_user_id, verified_by_user_id, verification_opinion, submitted_at, verified_at FROM t_repair_project_settlement WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'VERIFIED') ORDER BY version_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT settlement_item_id, settlement_id, work_point_id, actual_quantity, unit, actual_unit_price, amount_excluding_tax, variance_reason FROM t_repair_project_settlement_item WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} ORDER BY settlement_item_id
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_project_settlement SET status = #{status}, verified_by_user_id = #{verifiedByUserId}, verification_opinion = #{opinion}, verified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'SUBMITTED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot ( work_order_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, workflow_type, policy_hash, acceptance_method, requirements_json, finalizer_roles_json, basis_attachment_ids_json, basis_summary, affected_owner_count, minimum_affected_owner_participants, minimum_affected_owner_approvals, affected_owner_pass_rule, affected_owner_approval_ratio, version, status, locked_by_user_id ) VALUES ( NULL, #{row.projectId}, #{row.planId}, #{row.tenantId}, #{row.workflowType}, #{row.policyHash}, #{row.acceptanceMethod}, CAST(#{row.requirementsJson} AS JSONB), CAST(#{row.finalizerRolesJson} AS JSONB), CAST(#{row.basisAttachmentIdsJson} AS JSONB), #{row.basisSummary}, #{row.affectedOwnerCount}, CASE WHEN #{row.affectedOwnerCount} > 0 THEN #{row.minimumAffectedOwnerParticipants} ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN #{row.affectedOwnerCount} > 0 THEN #{minimumApprovals} ELSE NULL END, #{row.affectedOwnerPassRule}, #{row.affectedOwnerApprovalRatio}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 FROM t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{row.projectId}), 'ACTIVE', #{lockedByUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT policy_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, workflow_type, policy_hash, acceptance_method, requirements_json::TEXT AS requirements_json, finalizer_roles_json::TEXT AS finalizer_roles_json, basis_attachment_ids_json::TEXT AS basis_attachment_ids_json, basis_summary, affected_owner_count, COALESCE(minimum_affected_owner_participants, 0) AS minimum_affected_owner_participants, affected_owner_pass_rule, affected_owner_approval_ratio FROM t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT acceptance_id, project_id, policy_id, settlement_id, tenant_id, round_no, status, result_project_attachment_id, submitted_at, completed_at FROM t_repair_acceptance WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'COLLECTING'

SELECT acceptance_id, project_id, policy_id, settlement_id, tenant_id, round_no, status, result_project_attachment_id, submitted_at, completed_at FROM t_repair_acceptance WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY round_no DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT room_id FROM t_repair_acceptance_affected_owner WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND owner_uid = #{ownerUid} ORDER BY room_id

SELECT DISTINCT p.project_id FROM t_repair_project p JOIN t_repair_acceptance a ON a.project_id = p.project_id AND a.status = 'COLLECTING' JOIN t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot aps ON aps.policy_id = a.policy_id AND aps.status = 'ACTIVE' JOIN t_repair_acceptance_affected_owner ao ON ao.policy_id = aps.policy_id AND ao.tenant_id = aps.tenant_id WHERE p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.status = 'PENDING_ACCEPTANCE' AND ao.owner_uid = #{ownerUid} ORDER BY p.project_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_acceptance_party ( acceptance_id, tenant_id, participant_key, party_role, room_id, owner_uid, participant_account_id, participant_user_id, participant_name, participant_organization, committee_position, conclusion, opinion, submission_method, evidence_project_attachment_id, seal_usage_id, submitted_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{row.acceptanceId}, #{tenantId}, #{row.participantKey}, #{row.partyRole}, #{row.roomId}, #{row.ownerUid}, #{row.participantAccountId}, #{row.participantUserId}, #{row.participantName}, #{row.participantOrganization}, #{row.committeePosition}, #{row.conclusion}, #{row.opinion}, #{row.submissionMethod}, #{row.evidenceProjectAttachmentId}, #{row.sealUsageId}, #{row.submittedByUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT party_id, acceptance_id, participant_key, party_role, room_id, owner_uid, participant_account_id, participant_user_id, participant_name, participant_organization, committee_position, conclusion, opinion, submission_method, evidence_project_attachment_id, seal_usage_id, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_at FROM t_repair_acceptance_party WHERE acceptance_id = #{acceptanceId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY party_id

WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (participant_key) participant_key, party_role, conclusion, committee_position, seal_usage_id FROM t_repair_acceptance_party WHERE acceptance_id = #{acceptanceId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY participant_key, submitted_at DESC, party_id DESC ) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE party_role = 'AFFECTED_OWNER')::INT AS participating_affected_owner_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE party_role = 'AFFECTED_OWNER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED')::INT AS passed_affected_owner_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE conclusion = 'RECTIFICATION_REQUIRED')::INT AS rectification_count, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'BUILDING_LEADER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS building_leader_passed, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'COMMITTEE_EXECUTIVE_APPROVER' AND committee_position IN ('DIRECTOR', 'VICE_DIRECTOR') AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS committee_executive_passed, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'COMMITTEE_SEAL_OPERATOR' AND seal_usage_id IS NOT NULL AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS committee_seal_applied, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'PROPERTY_TECHNICAL_COSIGNER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS property_technical_cosigned, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'THIRD_PARTY_TECHNICAL_COSIGNER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS third_party_technical_cosigned FROM latest
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_acceptance SET status = #{status}, completed_by_user_id = #{completedByUserId}, result_project_attachment_id = #{resultAttachmentId}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, completion_remark = #{remark} WHERE acceptance_id = #{acceptanceId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'COLLECTING'
UPDATE t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot SET status = 'SUPERSEDED' WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(requested_amount), 0) FROM t_repair_payment_request WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND contract_id = #{contractId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status IN ('PENDING_FINANCE', 'APPROVED', 'PAID')

SELECT payment_request_id, project_id, contract_id, tenant_id, milestone_type, requested_amount, cumulative_requested_amount, eligible_upper_limit, status, requested_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_repair_payment_request WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY payment_request_id
SELECT payment_request_id, evidence_code, attachment_id FROM t_repair_payment_evidence WHERE payment_request_id = #{paymentRequestId} ORDER BY evidence_code

SELECT disclosure_id, project_id, tenant_id, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, posting_scope, notice_attachment_id, property_report_attachment_id, warranty_start_date, warranty_end_date, created_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_repair_completion_disclosure WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT attachment_id FROM t_repair_completion_disclosure_photo WHERE disclosure_id = #{disclosureId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort_order
